projects.title: Venue Illustrations
projects.description: An ongoing project over the last few years has been creating illustrations of some of the local venues in Nashville. Usually associated with a poster design for a show, this series has given me a chance to re-imagine some of the most storied live music venues in Nashville with alternate locations, radical situations, and stylized presentation. I look forward to doing many more.

projects.title: Cloudmouth Album Art
projects.description: Album art for Cloudmouth's first release, Drunk On What I Am. Each physical copy came with a fold-out 8×11 poster.

projects.title: Springwater Cabin Poster
projects.description: Poster illustration for a show of local songwriters, at Nashville's most infamous dive bar, Springwater.

projects.title: Listening Party
projects.description: Poster illustration for a show at the local coffee shop/juice bar/music venue The Post.

projects.title: Drunk On What I Am Illustration
projects.description: Approaching the end of the recording process for 'Drunk On What I Am', I started exploring ideas for the cover design. I wanted a sort of self-portrait, but also a symbolic and memorable setting. After experimenting with a number of concepts I chose the lake-sitting-skeleton-reflection concept to develop further.

projects.title: Squirrels Are Stealing My Tomatoes
projects.description: Cover illustration and design for Lazy Susan and the Dumbwaiters' first album, 'Squirrels Are Stealing My Tomatoes.'

projects.title: Captain's Lurch
projects.description: Shirt design for Punk Rockers Muddy Rails

projects.title: Volunteer Gardners Brigade
projects.description: Community Food Advocates came to me with a request to promote a local sustainable food initiative, the Volunteer Gardners Brigade. They wanted both a branded bade-style logo, and an illustrated poster to help visualize and engage possible participants. They wanted the style and tone to resemble the old 'Victory Garden' posters on the WWII era. I started with the badge, and then sketched out a few possible poster designs. The design that was chosen was then fully developed and illustrated, colored and textured digitally.

projects.title: Olmec Records
projects.description: Olmec is the moniker of a Nashville based collaborative hip-hop group. They want to represent their music using iconic imagery from South American anthropology.

projects.title: The Grayces Shirt
projects.description: Nashville's own rock trio The Grayces needed a new design for their shirts. We threw around a few ideas conceptually, but we ended up with a deep, deep adventure scene that is almost as exciting as their live show. Almost.

projects.title: Muddy Rails Album
projects.description: Album art for Iowa punk-rock group Muddy Rails. Design was hand-illustrated on a 2×6 board and photographed digitally. Colored, textured & treated in photoshop. Kissed by tiny baby angels & printed by underwater elves.

projects.title: Aquariums Shirt Design
projects.description: Shirt design for Nashville songwriter and sometimes d.i.y. folk band, Aquariums.

projects.title: Fancytramp
projects.description: Nashville Glam-punk-dream rock band Fancytramp came to me with a simple, ordinary request. They wanted a guitar-slinging ferocious centaur mascot for merch & shirts & general awesomeness. I was happy to oblige!

projects.title: Music Designs
projects.description: Designed to compliment & expand the music experience. Most designs are hand-drawn then computer enhanced, achieving a flesh-and-bones visual style while maintaining industry-standard deliverables. In other words, it looks great and it prints great.

projects.title: Green Wagon / Bongo Java Coffee Labels
projects.description: Bongo Java has been caffinating Nashvillians for years now, and I was happy to be able to design some custom labels for their roasted beans. The labels were printed especially for the Bongo Java coffee being sold at East Nashville's local general store, The Green Wagon.

projects.title: 5 Points Friday
projects.description: Homemade commerce, home-brewed beer, and hometown music at East Nashville's 5 Points. Promotional poster and magazine ad, logo design and East Nashville map design.

projects.title: A What-show?
projects.description: Local rock act needs a visceral visual image to match their visceral music. The throne can be a comfortable place to sit… but make sure you keep the doors locked. Hand drawn & digitally colored.

projects.title: CFA Crawfish Boil
projects.description: Those folks over at Community Food Advocates just don't get tired. They organized their Spring Crawfish Boil to raise money towards improving the Nashville area's food system and sustainability.

projects.title: Community Food Advocates
projects.description: Nashville's Community Food Advocates came to me with a last-minute request: a local farm had donated space & table settings for an event only a few weeks away, and they needed to promote & sell tickets as quick as possible. I created a tasty poster for the Buffalo Valley Farm Dinner with vivid textures and photos of real food.

projects.title: New Whole Usuals Poster
projects.description: Hand-illustrated poster for The New Whole Usuals. The Nashville group's shows are a spectacle worthy of a Shakespearean stage, and this design illustrates their penchant for drama.

projects.title: Heritage Dance Project
projects.description: Shirt design for Nashville's Heritage Dance Project. The concept was to abstract the figure of a dancer & turn that form into the shape of the branches and leaves.

projects.title: Seed Money Suppers
projects.description: Seed Money Suppers is a new event organized by the fine people over at Community Food Advocates which they dub "a community driven micro-grant program to build a healthier and more sustainable food system in Nashville." After conceiving of the event and setting up all the logistics, they needed a way to illustrate the very novel concept in a quick, fun & informative way.
